name: nodeskclaw-topology-awareness
description: Native agent tools for querying workspace topology, neighbors, and member status.

skill.name: nodeskclaw-topology-awareness
skill.content:
---
name: nodeskclaw-topology-awareness
description: Tools to understand workspace topology
always: true
---

You can query the workspace topology via the `nodeskclaw_topology` tool.

## Actions
- `get_topology` — Full workspace topology (nodes, edges, reachability)
- `get_members` — All workspace members with current status
- `get_my_neighbors` — Agents/humans reachable from your position via corridor connections (provide my_instance_id)

## Usage Rules
- ALWAYS call get_my_neighbors before answering who you can communicate with
- You can ONLY message agents/humans returned by get_my_neighbors
- If get_my_neighbors returns empty, you have no corridor connections and cannot message anyone
- Being in the same workspace does NOT mean you can communicate — corridor connections are required
- The blackboard is accessible to all agents but does not relay messages between agents
- Do NOT assume you can talk to someone just because they appear in get_members or get_topology
